zh.Bradford, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany於1341年出生在英國越可爾牛頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton16歲，母親Joan Nellison23歲。他和Margery Thweng至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1402年在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany于1341年出生在英国越可爾牛頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton16岁，母亲Joan Nellison23岁。他和Margery Thweng至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1402年在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany was born in 1341, in Newton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton, was 16 and his mother, Joan Nellison, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Margery Thweng. He died in 1402, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany est né en 1341, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Joan Nellison, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Margery Thweng. Il est décédé en 1402, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany 1341 in Newton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton 16 und seine Mutter Joan Nellison 23. Er hatte mit Margery Thweng mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1402 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany è nato il nel 1341 nel Newton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Joan Nellison, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Margery Thweng. Morì nel 1402, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albanyが1341年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newtonは16歳，母Joan Nellisonは23歳であった。彼はMargery Thwengとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1402年に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany(이)가 1341년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Nellison(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margery Thweng(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany nasceu em 1341, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Joan Nellison, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Margery Thweng. Ele faleceu em 1402, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany родился в 1341 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Nellison, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Margery Thweng. Он умер в 1402 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany nació en 1341, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Thornton, Lord of East Newton, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Joan Nellison, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Margery Thweng. Murió en 1402, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
